name: 김나은

appearance_en.face_shape: soft round face, full gentle cheeks, smooth rounded jaw — youth intact but quietly bruised by family tension she has witnessed too long
appearance_en.skin: fair bright Korean skin, healthy base tone but slightly pale from indoor office routine, fine smooth texture, minimal skincare, no visible pores at distance
appearance_en.eyes: large expressive double eyelid eyes, dark brown iris, slightly downturned outer corners creating a natural melancholic resting expression, long natural lashes, gaze indirect — often looks to the side rather than directly, as if listening more than speaking
appearance_en.nose: small straight nose, lightly upturned tip, soft and neat — harmonizes with the roundness of the face
appearance_en.mouth: soft medium lips, slightly full lower lip, resting expression slightly parted, natural unpainted lip color, no gloss or lipstick in daily life
appearance_en.eyebrows: softly arched medium-thin brows, lightly shaped, left brow rises almost imperceptibly when she notices something she decides not to comment on
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: single small mole below left eye approximately 1cm from lash line, downturned outer eye corners that make her look sad even when she is not
appearance_en.hair: straight fine black hair, medium length to collarbone, healthy natural shine, worn loose or in a simple low ponytail with plain elastic — no heat styling, falls forward when looking down

body.proportions: petite slender frame, narrow shoulders, slim fine arms, small hands, overall slight physical presence
body.posture: shoulders drawn slightly inward, arms held close to body — the learned smallness of someone who grew up in a house full of adult arguments
body.body_prompt: 162cm petite slender Korean woman, narrow shoulders drawn slightly inward, arms close to body, quiet contained physical presence

default.description: plain pastel blouse or soft knit top in muted tones, simple straight-cut trousers or neat midi skirt, flat shoes, small plain tote bag
default.wardrobe_prompt: plain soft pastel blouse or knit top in cream or pale pink, straight-cut trousers or midi skirt, flat shoes, small fabric tote bag

casual.description: simple oversized beige or cream sweatshirt or sweater, straight jeans, white sneakers — clothes designed to disappear
casual.wardrobe_prompt: oversized beige or cream soft sweatshirt, straight-cut jeans, plain white sneakers, no accessories

stressed.description: same plain clothes but arms wrapped around herself, cardigan pulled tight, looking down, presence even smaller than usual
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same soft pastel clothes, cardigan or sweater held wrapped around herself, slightly huddled body language

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: quiet default expression — the face of someone who has watched everything and said little, occasional sharpness in the eyes that vanishes as soon as noticed
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: soft round-faced Korean woman late 20s to early 30s, large dark eyes with downturned outer corners and small mole below left eye, softly arched brows, small upturned nose, soft slightly parted lips, straight fine black hair to collarbone, 162cm petite slender narrow-shouldered, fair bright Korean skin, quietly melancholic natural presence

style_prompt: photorealistic, ordinary Korean young woman working at a small company, no beauty filter, no skin retouching, natural skin with minimal makeup, realistic everyday appearance, soft natural window light, 50mm lens, street-cast fresh-faced realism, cinematic restraint
negative_prompt: illustration, anime, cartoon, 3d render, ugly, deformed, heavy makeup, idol look, glamorous, extra fingers, overly cheerful, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, perfect complexion, smooth flawless skin, model look, celebrity appearance, skin retouching, instagram filter
